summary: Planned MPI-122 with investigation-backed dependency, UI, runtime availability, and local/remote lifecycle contracts.
Picked up MPI-122; todo->doing. Starting Phase 1 (dependency resolver + wan-22 merge + contract tests).
Plan rewritten to operations-keyed shape (commonDeps+operations) + big-bang sequencing per user. Phase 1 complete: pure resolver + 7 passing contract tests. models.js NOT yet touched (app unchanged).

doing->done. Wan 2.2 merged to single op-selectable model; full resolver chokepoint + per-op install/uninstall toggles (Install/Update/Uninstall machine, persisted draft, requiresOps cascade, base-toggle gating). All gates green (9 resolver tests, lint 0 err, release:check, desktop spec). UX accepted by user. downloads.md + data.md + comfy.md updated.
